name: nestjs
appliesWhen: preferredStack matches /nest|nestjs/i OR T-000-discovery locks NestJS as the backend

officialRepos.name: nestjs/nest
officialRepos.why: Official NestJS framework source and reference for the request lifecycle.

officialRepos.name: nestjs/typescript-starter
officialRepos.why: Canonical project scaffold (config, testing, lint) maintained by the core team.

officialRepos.name: nestjs/awesome-nestjs
officialRepos.why: Curated list including clean/hexagonal architecture sample repos.

officialRepos.name: typestack/class-validator
officialRepos.why: Decorator-based DTO validation used with the global ValidationPipe.

officialRepos.name: colinhacks/zod
officialRepos.why: Schema validation for DTOs and env-config validation at boot.

officialRepos.name: typeorm/typeorm
officialRepos.why: Data-mapper ORM that fits the repository port/adapter pattern.

officialRepos.name: prisma/prisma
officialRepos.why: Schema-first ORM alternative; wrap behind a repository port.
